---
title: "Rice Competitive Edge Lab"
toc: false
---

[Official Rice web page](https://sport.rice.edu/hutch/rce-lab){target=_blank}

## Current Students

[Rose Graves](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rose-graves/){target=_blank} (PhD Statistics, exp. 2027)

[Lou Zhou](https://lou-zhou.github.io/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics, exp. 2027)

[Ethan Larimore](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ethan-larimore/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics, exp. 2028)

[Anjali Menezes](https://www.linkedin.com/in/anjali-menezes-29960631b/){target=_blank} (BA Sport Analytics; Business, exp. 2028)

## Alumni

[Rahul Herrero](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rahul-herrero-a70550261/){target=_blank} (BA Mathematical Economic Analysis; Sport Analytics, exp. 2027)

[Elisabeth Millington](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elisabeth-millington/){target=_blank} (BA Sports Medicine & Exercise Physiology; Sport Analytics 2026)

[Lucca Ferraz](https://lucca-ferraz.github.io/www/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics 2026)

[Elizabeth (Ellie) Sepúlveda](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elizabeth-ellie-sep%C3%BAlveda-76a852224/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics 2025)
&ensp;![](https://www.mlbstatic.com/team-logos/team-cap-on-dark/142.svg){height=22}

[Ruoqian (Judy) Zhu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/judy-zhu-34060b22b/){target=_blank} (BA Mathematics 2025)
&ensp;![](https://teamworks.com/wp-content/uploads/fav-icon-150x150.png){height=22}

[Naomi Consiglio](https://www.linkedin.com/in/naomi-consiglio/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics 2025)

[Jacob Hahn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacobfhahn/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics 2025)
&ensp;![](https://www.mlbstatic.com/team-logos/team-cap-on-dark/112.svg){height=22}

[Jeff Brover](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeff-brover/){target=_blank} (BA Statistics; Sport Analytics 2024)
&ensp;![](https://www.mlbstatic.com/team-logos/team-cap-on-dark/136.svg){height=22}

[Luke Stancil](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukejstancil/){target=_blank} (BA Economics; Computational and Applied Mathematics 2024)
